news.headline: Cognizant's stock surges after activist investor Mantle Ridge acquires significant stake.
Holing, TKO, Williams-Sonoma, & Expand Energy set to enter S&P 500 index - reports indicate.
CTSH sees gains after activist Mantle Ridge acquires stake.
Trump announced at a Crypto Summit in the White House that U.S. aims to dominate with Bitcoin. Top crypto execs attended.
news.summary: In a groundbreaking event at the White House, the president met with top crypto executives, demonstrating Mr. Trump's support for the industry that was once seen as rogue.

news.headline: BCE Inc. (BCE) files 2024 annual report on Form 40-F with SEC, including audited financial statements for year ended Dec 31, 2024.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, BCE Inc. shared that it has submitted its annual report for 2024 on Form 40-F to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). Traded on both TSX and NYSE under the ticker symbol BCE, the report entails audited financial details encompassing the period concluding on December 31, 2024.

news.headline: CHLA supports Gov. Newsom's order extending hotel occupancy for LA fire victims to July 1, 2025.
news.summary: The Governor of California has issued an executive order extending the prohibition of establishing tenancy in hotels in Los Angeles County for evacuees until July 1, 2025. The California Hotel & Lodging Association has expressed its support for this decision.

news.headline: Haddad predicts food inflation will decrease because of record harvest
Pony Express Pipeline offers new open season for crude oil transportation tariff rates from Colorado, lasting 30 days from March 7, 2025.
news.summary: Tallgrass Pony Express Pipeline, LLC (Pony Express), managed by Tallgrass, has introduced a fresh binding open season to offer incentive tariff rates. This initiative involves utilizing the current Pony Express capacity for shipping commitments related to the transportation of crude oil originating from Colorado via Pony Express. The open season will last for 30 days, starting on March 7, 2025. Interested shippers looking to partake in this program offering reduced tariffs can access specific details about the open season once they sign a confidentiality agreement.

news.headline: Haddad predicts Brazil 2025 growth to be more moderate due to inflation
Brazil Finance Minister Fernando Haddad on podcast
Kestra Medical Technologies, Ltd. closed an upsized IPO offering 11.88 million shares at $17 each, raising $202 million.
news.summary: Kestra Medical Technologies, Ltd. based in Kirkland, Washington, disclosed the completion of its enlarged initial public offering of 11,882,352 common shares at a price of $17.00 per share on March 07, 2025, under the Nasdaq symbol "KMTS." The offering generated about $202 million in total gross proceeds, prior to deducting underwriting discounts and commissions as well as other related expenses. Kestra exclusively offered all the common shares. The company started trading its common shares on the Nasdaq Global Select Market on March 6, 2025.

news.headline: Better Choice Company (NYSE: BTTR) will share Q4 & full year 2024 financial results on March 27, 2025, at 4:30 p.m. ET.
news.summary: In Tampa, Florida, on March 7, 2025, Better Choice Company Inc. (NYSE: BTTR) revealed plans to hold a conference call and webcast on March 27, 2025, at 4:30 p.m. ET. This event aims to review the financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024, along with offering a business update. Better Choice specializes in pet health and wellness, serving as a significant player in this sector. The Company's decision to engage in this interactive session indicates a transparent approach to sharing its financial performance, strategies, and future outlook with investors and stakeholders.

news.headline: Heritage Industrial Finishing awarded contract to coat MK84 bomb fin for US Department of Defense.
news.summary: Heritage Industrial Finishing, based in Akron, Ohio, has recently announced securing a significant contract to supply advanced coatings for MK84 bomb fins. These coatings are considered crucial for the U.S. Department of Defense. This contract represents a lucrative opportunity for Heritage Industrial Finishing, showcasing its expertise in providing specialized coatings for military equipment. This deal underscores the importance of precision and quality in defense materials, emphasizing the critical nature of these coatings for national security. The specific financial details of the contract have not been disclosed.

news.headline: GreenPower Motor Company Inc. launches ATM Equity Program on March 7, 2025, as a leading maker of zero-emission vehicles.
news.summary: In Vancouver, BC on March 7, 2025, GreenPower Motor Company Inc. (NASDAQ: GP) (TSXV: GPV) disclosed its latest achievements as a prominent producer and supplier of fully electric, custom-made, emission-free medium and heavy-duty vehicles. The company reported that it has...

news.headline: Stay informed on China's economic challenges, sports investment, faith-based investing on Wall Street Week by Bloomberg.
news.summary: Keep an eye on China's economic hurdles as they face slowing growth rates, with their GDP expected to fall to 2.1% within the next quarter. Meanwhile, the sports industry has seen a surge in investments, with a total of $5 billion poured into major sports teams and events worldwide. On the other hand, faith-based investing has gained traction as more investors are seeking out ethical and socially responsible options, amounting to a total of $8.5 billion allocated towards such ventures.

news.headline: Vaccinex to delist Common Stock from Nasdaq; suspended since Dec 18, 2024; aiming a differentiated approach in treating neurodegenerative diseases.
news.summary: On March 07, 2025, in Rochester, New York, Vaccinex, Inc. (OTC: VCNX) revealed its plan to remove its common stock from the Nasdaq. The clinical-stage biotech firm focuses on tackling neurodegenerative diseases by targeting astrogliosis and neuroinflammation via SEMA4D inhibition. The stock's Nasdaq trading halt commenced on December 18, 2024.

news.headline: US plans to utilize stablecoins for dollar dominance, with President Trump and Scott Bessent pushing for strong regulatory measures.
news.summary: President Trump and Scott Bessent have advocated for the establishment of a thorough regulatory framework regarding stablecoins, emphasizing the necessity for a transparent and consistent regulatory landscape.

news.headline: Orezone Gold Completes C$35M Bought Deal through Final Short Form Prospectus.
Trump postponed tariffs on Mexico and Canada due to market backlash. Import duties could escalate inflation with prices high.
news.summary: Amid high prices, the Trump administration is cautious of exacerbating inflation through import tariffs.

news.headline: Methanex releases 2024 Sustainability Report highlighting progress on key sustainability topics.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, Methanex Corporation (TSX:MX) (Nasdaq:MEOH) has issued its 2024 Sustainability Report, outlining advancements on key sustainability matters crucial to both the company and stakeholders. This report summarizes the corporation's sustainability efforts and progress.

news.headline: FTP, INC. acquires Coastal Flood Underwriters, LLC, enhancing flood insurance services. Strengthening commitment to comprehensive solutions.
news.summary: Today, FTP, INC. revealed the acquisition of Coastal Flood Underwriters, LLC, a leading provider of flood insurance solutions. This decision bolsters FTP's dedication to offering thorough and customized flood insurance services.

news.headline: Magellan Aerospace announces quarterly dividend of $0.025 per share ($0.025). Board reviews dividends quarterly.
news.summary: In Toronto, Magellan Aerospace Corporation (TSX: MAL) disclosed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.025 per share for the company's common shares. This decision is part of the Board's ongoing assessment of dividends on a quarterly basis to provide more predictability during the recovery period. The aim is to strike a balance between returning capital to shareholders and preserving financial stability.

news.headline: Constellation Software Inc. reports Q4 & full-year 2024 results, $1.00 dividend declared, payable to shareholders on April 15.
news.summary: On March 07, 2025, Constellation Software Inc. (TSX:CSU) disclosed its financial outcomes for Q4 and the full year ending December 31, 2024. The company announced a dividend of $1.00 per share to be paid on April 15, 2025, for all common shareholders on record by March 28, 2025. This dividend is classified as an eligible dividend under the Income Tax Act (Canada). Notably, all figures mentioned in the report are denoted in U.S. Dollars, unless specified otherwise.

news.headline: GAP holds General Ordinary Shareholders’ Meeting in Guadalajara, Mexico on March 7, 2025.
news.summary: In Guadalajara, Mexico, on March 07, 2025, Grupo Aeroportuario del Pacífico, S.A.B. de C.V. (NYSE: PAC; BMV: GAP) shared the following update.

news.headline: Stran & Company reports $20.1 million sales in Q3 2024, $2.0 million net loss. Received Nasdaq listing extension. Acquisition boosts sales.
news.summary: Stran & Company, Inc. has been granted a listing extension from the Nasdaq Hearing Panel subject to meeting three conditions. The company has met the first condition by becoming current on its financial filings, including filing its Form 10-Q for Q3 2024. The second condition, regarding the Nasdaq minimum closing bid price requirement, was also met. The third condition is holding the annual shareholder meeting, which the company plans to do after filing its Form 10-K for 2024. Sales for Q3 2024 increased by 2.4% to $20.1 million, with a gross profit decrease of 7.0%. The company acquired Gander Group assets during this period. Net loss for Q3 2024 was approximately $2.0 million. For the nine months ending September 30, 2024, sales increased by 4.9% to $55.7 million, with a gross profit decrease of 0.1% and a net loss of approximately $3.6 million. The company acquired strategic assets from Gander Group to enhance its market presence. Stran is optimistic about growth opportunities in 2025, with a focus on expanding market presence. The company has strong financials, with $17.0 million in cash, cash equivalents, and investments as of September 30, 2024. They aim to reconnect with shareholders through upcoming quarterly conference calls.

news.headline: Titanium Transportation Group to discuss Q4 results on March 17, 2025 after market close. TSX:TTNM, OTCQX:TTNMF.
news.summary: A transportation company based in Bolton, Ontario, Titanium Transportation Group Inc. (TSX:TTNM, OTCQX:TTNMF) is set to release its financial results for the quarter ending December 31, 2024 on March 17, 2025. The announcement will be made after the market closes, offering stakeholders and investors valuable insights into the company's performance during that period. This update is anticipated to provide important data and figures for analysts and interested individuals to review and assess the company's progress.

news.headline: Unison Mortgage offers Equity Sharing Home Loan in New Jersey for low monthly payments, to convert home equity into cash.
news.summary: A new second mortgage loan product has been introduced by Unison Mortgage Corporation in New Jersey on March 7, 2025. The product, known as the Equity Sharing Home Loan, aims to assist individuals in funding various goals, such as home renovations. Through this offering, borrowers can benefit from low monthly payments. This initiative by Unison Mortgage Corporation, a subsidiary of Unison, provides an opportunity for homeowners to access additional funds while managing their financial obligations effectively.

news.headline: Arcos Dorados sets AGM for April 25, 2025, in Curaçao at 4:00 p.m. Shareholders must be recorded by March 31, 2025.
news.summary: Arcos Dorados Holdings Inc. (NYSE: ARCO), the biggest restaurant chain in Latin America and the top independent McDonald's franchisee globally, revealed that its Board of Directors has scheduled the Annual Shareholders’ Meeting ("AGM") for April 25, 2025. The meeting will take place at 4:00 p.m. (local time) in Willemstad, Curaçao. Shareholders as of March 31, 2025, will be eligible to attend.

news.headline: Will Solana (SOL) price bounce back to $180? Market conditions hint at a possible rally despite recent slump.
news.summary: Solana's value has recently declined, reflecting a broader trend affecting the cryptocurrency market. The current price of Solana (SOL) is facing challenges similar to other digital assets. Investors wonder if an overall market upswing will benefit SOL and other cryptocurrencies.

Fitch affirms Malta at A Plus, outlook stable
Fitch affirms Kuwait at AA-; outlook stable
Luraco Tech launches FOP Care Chair Contest to support first responders' wellness, awarding medical massage chair worth over $10,000.
news.summary: In Arlington, Texas, on March 7, 2025, Luraco Technologies, acclaimed for its advancements in medical massage chair technology, has introduced the FOP Care Chair Contest. This competition aims to provide a cutting-edge medical massage chair, valued at a substantial amount, to the deserving winner.

news.headline: Galco acquires Brozelco, Inc., enhancing industrial automation capabilities. MADISON HEIGHTS, Mich., March 7, 2025.
news.summary: Galco Industrial Electronics, Inc. in Madison Heights, Michigan, made a significant move on March 7, 2025. They acquired Brozelco, Inc., an industrial company based in Tennessee. This acquisition will enhance Galco's industrial automation, engineering, and system integration capabilities. The deal marks an important strategic decision for Galco as they aim to expand their reach and offerings in the industry. The financial details of the acquisition were not disclosed to the public.

news.headline: Healthcare startup Hinge Health considers IPO filing next week, according to sources familiar with the matter.
Ardmore Shipping files 2024 annual report on Form 20-F with US SEC on March 7, 2025.
news.summary: Bermuda-based Ardmore Shipping Corporation (NYSE: ASC) released information on March 7, 2025, stating that they have submitted their Annual Report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2024, to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission.

news.headline: Blueberries Medical to raise C$1 million through private placement of 96,064,935 shares at C$0.011 each. Funding for expansion.
news.summary: Blueberries Medical Corp., a Latin American medicinal cannabis producer, has announced a non-brokered private placement. The placement involves the sale of 96,064,935 common shares at a price of C$0.011 per share, totaling approximately C$1.05 million (or roughly US$740,000). The purpose of this offering is to fund and expand operations, as well as for general corporate and working capital needs. The closing date for this private placement is anticipated to be around March 25, 2024.

news.headline: Trump wants to replace income tax with tariffs, National Economic Council Director says. President views EU auto tariff as unfair.
news.summary: Kevin Hassett, Director of the White House National Economic Council, stated in an interview with Bloomberg Television that President Donald Trump is looking to replace income tax revenue with tariff revenue. Hassett emphasized Trump’s belief that this move could benefit everyone. He also discussed the forthcoming trade policies, mentioning that there will be "some" tariffs implemented, which will be "reciprocal." Trump expressed dissatisfaction with the EU's 10% tariff on automobiles, deeming it as unjust. Hassett indicated that the upcoming reciprocal tariffs will extend beyond automobiles, with a broader scope. This information was shared during Hassett's recent Bloomberg interview.

news.headline: FDA approves Encelto gene therapy for Rare Disease - Encelto (revakinagene taroretcel-lwey) approved on 7th March 2025.
news.summary: In Silver Spring, Md., on March 7, 2025, the U.S. Food and Drug Administration released a summary of recent developments. The FDA announced on Wednesday the approval of Encelto (revakinagene taroretcel-lwey), a groundbreaking allogeneic encapsulated cell-based gene therapy. This approval marks a significant advancement in the field of gene therapy, providing hope for many patients.

news.headline: Interim SEC Chair Mark Uyeda prepares for less active rulemaking, aiming to be methodical. Replaced Gary Gensler; described Gensler's actions as 'overly ambitious'. Appeared at CFO Network Summit in New York. Biden appointee; Uyeda's goal is to change key aspects of the commission.
news.summary: Mark Uyeda, the interim SEC Chair, took over from Gary Gensler as the top official at the agency after Donald Trump's inauguration. Uyeda, a fellow Biden appointee, discussed plans to alter crucial elements of the commission at the Wall Street Journal's CFO Network Summit in New York. He criticized the rapid and aggressive shift in direction under Gensler's leadership, labeling it as "overly ambitious." Uyeda's remarks indicate a significant shift in approach at the SEC, following his recent appointment.

news.headline: S&P Global Ratings maintains Iceland's credit rating at 'A+/A-1', with a stable outlook.
news.summary: S&P Global Ratings has maintained Iceland's foreign and local currency sovereign credit ratings at 'A+/A-1' for the long- and short-term. The rating agency has also assigned a stable outlook to the country.

news.headline: Pennant Group (NASDAQ: PNTG) to join 2025 Oppenheimer Annual Healthcare Conference on March 18.
news.summary: An announcement was made by The Pennant Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: PNTG) based in Eagle, Idaho on March 7, 2025. This company acts as the parent entity for a series of home health, hospice, and senior living companies under the Pennant umbrella. It revealed plans to take part in the 2025 Oppenheimer Co. Annual Healthcare MedTech & Services Conference slated for March 18, 2025. This conference is a significant event in the healthcare sector, attracting top industry players to discuss trends and advancements in medical technology and services. Mark your calendars for this engaging conference where the latest developments and insights will be shared by key professionals in the field.

news.headline: Canoe EIT Income Fund will distribute $0.10 per unit in March 2025 to unitholders on record as of March 21.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on March 07, 2025, Canoe EIT Income Fund (TSX - EIT.UN) declared a monthly distribution of $0.10 per unit for March 2025. Unitholders recorded on March 21, 2025, are eligible to receive the distributions, which will be paid out on April 15, 2025.

news.headline: The Arena Group names Paul Edmondson CEO, removing interim tag. Edmondson was COO and President prior. Effective immediately.
news.summary: The Arena Group Holdings, Inc. has appointed Paul Edmondson as the new Chief Executive Officer, effective immediately. Edmondson, who previously held the position of interim CEO since February 12, 2025, had also served as the company’s COO and President of Platform. The decision was made by the Board of Directors of the company listed on NYSE American under the ticker symbol AREN. The Board expressed confidence in Edmondson's experience and entrepreneurial strategy, believing it aligns well with the company's current rapid transformation.

news.headline: Bragg Gaming (NASDAQ: BRAG, TSX: BRAG) to report Q4 and Full Year 2024 results on March 20, 2025 in Toronto at 8:30 a.m. ET.
news.summary: In Toronto today, Bragg Gaming Group (NASDAQ: BRAG, TSX: BRAG) revealed they are set to unveil their financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 before the opening of the financial markets on Thursday, March 20, 2025. Following the release, there will be a conference call at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time led by Bragg's CEO, Matevž Mazij, and CFO, Robbie Bressler, to analyze the financial outcomes and offer insights.

news.headline: Paragon 28 presents new products at AAOS conference, focused on foot and ankle orthopedics.(event dates: March 10-14)
news.summary: Paragon 28, Inc., a prominent medical device company concentrating on foot and ankle orthopedics, will be showcasing its new products at the American Academy of Orthopaedic Surgeons conference from March 10th – 14th. The company, listed on NYSE as FNA, plans to present a range of recently launched products designed to improve patient outcomes and surgeon experiences. These include the SMART 28℠ Case Management Portal with the SMART Bun-Yo-Matic℠ Digital case management tool.

news.headline: Health In Tech (NASDAQ: HIT) to announce Q4 and full year 2024 financial results on March 17, 2025, after market close.
news.summary: Stuart, Florida - On March 7, 2025, Health In Tech (NASDAQ: HIT), a company in the insurtech industry supported by third-party AI technology, shared plans to unveil its financial performance for the fourth quarter and entire year concluding on December 31, 2024. The report is set to be disclosed after the market closes.

news.headline: EpicQuest Education (NASDAQ: EEIQ) notified of Nasdaq minimum bid price deficiency; provides higher education internationally.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, in Middletown, Ohio, EpicQuest Education Group International Limited, traded as EEIQ on NASDAQ, disclosed the reception of an announcement. The company, a renowned higher education provider for both local and global students across the US, Canada, and the UK, shared this update.

news.headline: Nano Labs Ltd (Nasdaq: NA) holds a general meeting in Hong Kong on March 7; a leading chip design company in China.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, in Hong Kong, Nano Labs Ltd (Nasdaq: NA), a prominent fabless integrated circuit design company and product solution provider based in China, disclosed the convening of an extraordinary general meeting of shareholders. This meeting held significance in the company's operations and strategy planning in the current market landscape.
